title: Andrew Gilbertson
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
'''Andrew Gilbertson''' co-contributed to the backstory of [[Leektar/Legends|Leektar]] appearing in the [[Databank (original)|Databank]], through the ''[[What's The Story?]]'' feature of [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]]. His alias is ''Hecko Tenton'' on Star Wars Hyperspace, ''Zarm R'keeg'' on [[StarWars.com]], and ''Zarm_Rkeeg'' on [[TheForce.net]].

{{Bio-stub}}
